site.title: Verse - Capture anytime. Create anything.
site.description: Combining Notion-style structured documents, Obsidian-style local privacy, and AI writing intelligence into one productivity tool.

hero.title: Capture anytime. Create anything.
hero.subtitle: Notion's workspace · Obsidian's privacy · AI's intelligence
hero.desc:
More than just another notes app.
Combining Notion's structured document management, Obsidian's local-first privacy, and AI writing assistance —
one tool for capturing, organizing, and writing.

features.title: Notion + Obsidian + AI
features.desc: No feature bloat — combining the best of three worlds into one compound productivity tool

items.title: Structured Document Workspace
items.desc: Manage documents with folders and tree structure, like Notion. Keep your data on your machine, like Obsidian. Rich text WYSIWYG editing with instant Markdown split-pane switching.
items.detail: Notion's structure + Obsidian's privacy — one tool.

items.title: AI Writing Partner
items.desc: Select multiple notes as context, choose a template, and AI drafts based on YOUR content — not generic knowledge, but your own thinking refined. Supports 4 rewriting tones.
items.detail: Your material. Your document. AI just helps.

items.title: Link Previews
items.desc: Paste a URL into your document and it auto-expands into a rich media card — web summaries, video embeds, cover images. Preview without leaving the editor.
items.detail: Paste and preview. Stay in flow.

items.title: Calendar Notes
items.desc: Built-in calendar component for quick daily notes. Perfect for journals, work logs, and meeting memos, seamlessly connected to your document system.
items.detail: A timeline approach to note-taking — natural and intuitive.

items.title: Attachment Management
items.desc: Upload and embed images, videos, PDFs, and text files. Preview them directly inside the app — no external programs needed. Locally stored, secure and reliable.
items.detail: Drag and drop. Preview in place.

items.title: Sync & Share (PRO)
items.desc: End-to-end encrypted bidirectional sync between desktop and web. Generate public read-only share links. Secure, seamless access anywhere.

howItWorks.title: Three Steps to a Finished Document
howItWorks.desc: From scattered notes to polished output in three simple steps

steps.title: Capture Ideas Freely
steps.desc: Thoughts, chat excerpts, work progress, daily items — record them in whatever way feels natural. Don't worry about format or structure.

steps.title: Let AI Refine
steps.desc: Select multiple notes as context, choose a document template. AI asks clarifying questions first, then generates a structured draft. Refine with different tones anytime.

steps.title: Export & Use
steps.desc: Fine-tune in the editor, then copy to clipboard, export as Markdown or PDF. An email, a report, an article — ready to use.

useCases.title: Who It's For
useCases.desc: Whether you're a professional, job seeker, student, or creator — Verse makes document work effortless

items.title: Professionals
items.desc: Weekly reports, performance reviews, meeting notes, client emails — all your daily documents in one place.

items.title: Job Seekers
items.desc: Resumes, cover letters, interview stories — AI helps you polish every experience.

items.title: Students
items.desc: Book reports, presentations, course summaries — from research to final draft with ease.

items.title: Content Creators
items.desc: Topic brainstorming, script writing, article publishing — capture inspiration and produce polished work.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.desc: Start free, upgrade as you grow
pricing.faqQ1: Are there limitations on the Free plan?
pricing.faqA1: The Free plan includes full editor and local storage capabilities, enough for daily note-taking and writing. AI writing assistant and cloud sync are paid features.
pricing.faqQ2: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
pricing.faqA2: Yes. PRO and PLUS subscriptions are billed yearly and can be cancelled anytime. You'll retain full access until the end of the billing period.
pricing.faqA3: Free plan data is entirely local. PRO cloud sync uses end-to-end encryption — servers cannot read your content.
pricing.faqA4: Currently supports Windows (x64), macOS (Intel & Apple Silicon) desktop apps, and a web browser version. macOS 15+ required.

cta.title: Get Started with Verse
cta.desc: Download for free and experience local-first document working

download.title: Download Verse
download.desc: Choose your platform and get started
download.webDesc: No installation needed, open in your browser

items.q: How is Verse different from ChatGPT?
items.a: ChatGPT is a chat window, great for one-off content generation. But if you want to accumulate notes over time and turn scattered material into polished documents, the isolated chat format isn't ideal — conversations are independent and hard to cross-reference. Verse is a writing workspace: your notes live in folders on your machine, you can select multiple entries as context, and AI helps you draft from your own material. Simply put: ChatGPT is for conversation. Verse is for writing.

items.q: How is Verse different from Notion / Obsidian?
items.a: Verse combines Notion's structured document management with Obsidian's local-first philosophy, and adds AI writing assistance on top. You can organize documents like Notion, protect privacy like Obsidian, and use AI to turn scattered notes into polished documents — the best of three worlds integrated into one tool.

Free plan data is stored entirely in a local SQLite database and never uploaded to any server. AI features only access content you explicitly select as context. PRO cloud sync uses end-to-end encryption.

items.q: How does the AI feature work?
items.a: In the AI panel on the right, select a document template (general, email, weekly report, etc.), reference your notes, and AI will ask clarifying questions before generating a draft. You can then rewrite with 4 different tones and apply to the editor with one click.

items.q: What's the difference between Free and paid plans?
items.a: Free includes full editing and local storage — great for daily use. PRO adds cloud sync, cloud image storage, and document sharing. PLUS offers AI writing assistant and AI rewriting (1M tokens/month). See the pricing page for a detailed comparison.

items.q: How do I import / export documents?
items.a: Import supports Markdown files and ZIP archives. Export supports Markdown, PDF, and clipboard copy. You can also export the entire workspace as a ZIP backup.
Currently available on Windows (x64) and macOS 15+ (Intel & Apple Silicon) as a desktop app, plus a web browser version.

items.q: Is there a team or enterprise plan?
items.a: We currently focus on individual users. If you have team collaboration needs, please reach out through our feedback channels — we'll plan based on demand.
